llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 8.2 moved to consent section. Item 11.2 (Measure U application for Northstar Academy) moved to consent. Items 11.3 to 11.7 (second readings of policies) moved to consent.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve the consent items?

items.intro_words: Call to order, please.
Trustee Wells. Here. Trustee Lawson.
Well, welcome, everyone. It's great to see all of you.
Welcome, everyone, to the Dec. 8 Redwood City School Board meeting.
Do I have any changes to the agenda?
So we are on to number six, our Citizens Measure U Oversight committee.
So we are on to number six, our Citizens Measure U Oversight committee.
We are on to the next agenda item. We have our bond program consent items.
We are on to the next agenda item. We have our bond program consent items.
We have bond program action item 8.1, which also has a resolution as part of it.
We are on to a 9.1. On my agenda, I have a 9 point. 9.1 twice.
Educator Effectiveness is the block grant that's coming from the state.
So we have our consent items. And as a reminder, we moved up 11.2 through 11.8.
We are on to 11.1, which is the adoption of Resolution 19.
We're on to 11.8, which is approval of personnel changes.
We're on to 11.9. Approval of provisional internship permit.
Now we're on to 11:10, which is our annual developer fee report.
We're on to board and superintendent reports. I'd like to start.
So correspondence. I think we already mentioned earlier that we received a lot of correspondence.
Other business suggested items for future agenda.
Board agenda calendar. Was there any additions to that?
We are at the adjournment time and actually it's 9:08.
